pages.title: Entity Page Example
pages.text:
This is an entity page.

§eentity§r specifies the entity ID.

§etitle§r is the page title.

§etext§r is the description text.

The entity name is displayed automatically.

pages.title: About Entity Pages
pages.text:
§6entity§r page type is used to introduce mobs or NPCs.

Describe their behavior, drops, spawn locations, etc.

Supports all vanilla and modded entities.
